raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A gray table holds two cans: a red can on the left and a gold can on the right. The cans are cylindrical with flat tops and sides. STRATEGY - The task is to pick the gold can. First, reach for the gold can, grasp its body for stability, then lift and transport it to a destination (implied by the task, likely a surface or container not shown). Failure modes include misgrasping (e.g., grabbing the red can instead) or dropping during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the gold can’s body to establish contact. Step 2: Grasp the gold can’s body to secure it. Step 3: Transport the gold can to the destination. Step 4: Place the gold can at the destination.**
Goal: held(gold_can); stable(gold_can)
Scene: gold_can, red_can, table
Step 1: reach(gold_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the gold can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, gold_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, gold_can) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(gold_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the gold can
  contact: holding(gold_can) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(gold_can)
Step 3: transport(gold_can -> destination)
  affordance_region: an empty area at the destination
  spatial: above(gold_can, destination, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(gold_can)
  done_when: above(gold_can, destination, 0.05)
Step 4: place(gold_can -> destination)
  affordance_region: an empty area at the destination
  contact: surface_contact(gold_can, destination) [completion]; released(gold_can) [completion]
  pose: stable(gold_can) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(gold_can, destination) AND released(gold_can)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the gold can
the body of the gold can
an empty area at the destination
an empty area at the destination
